ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Full text of the review provided by the customer */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified (True/False) */,
  "review_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the review was submitted */,
  "log_votes" REAL /* Logarithm of votes received for the review */,
  "is_positive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is positive (True/False) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score indicating the sentiment of the review (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "helpfulness_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating how helpful the review is */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured (True/False) */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "average_sentiment" REAL /* Average sentiment score of all reviews for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., customer, moderator, admin) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted by the user */,
  "average_rating_given" REAL /* Average rating given by the user across all reviews */,
  "last_review_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last review submitted by the user */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score assigned to the user based on their review history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating based on reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received for the product */,
  "total_positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of positive reviews */,
  "total_negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of negative reviews */,
  "total_neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of neutral reviews */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of all reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being flagged */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  "flag_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the review was flagged */,
  "flagged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flag (e.g., pending, resolved, ignored) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flag was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_flagged_by FOREIGN KEY ("flagged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the review was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the review */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES users_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews on that date */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating on that date */,
  "total_positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of positive reviews on that date */,
  "total_negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of negative reviews on that date */,
  "total_neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of neutral reviews on that date */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of all reviews on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
